decisions: Preserve source rowid as physical source lineage.
Preserve raw ran independently from observed source-row count.
Preserve raw pos without replacing it with a normalised result.
Preserve raw btn and raw ovr_btn without forced recalculation.
Derive a positive numeric finishing position only where raw pos is a positive integer.
Map all 11 validated textual outcome codes while retaining the exact raw pos value.
Keep DSQ separate from ordinary non-finish outcomes because disqualified runners retain numeric distance values.
Derive a candidate dead-heat flag only where a duplicated positive position also shares the same raw ovr_btn.
Preserve numeric pos = 0 as unresolved and flag it.
Flag numeric positions above ran without automatically correcting them.
Flag the five incomplete race extracts at race level.
Preserve externally verified corrections as audit records rather than overwriting immutable source values.
Do not force btn and ovr_btn into a universally additive sequence.
Defer final staging-table and target-schema design.

verified_anomaly.handling: Preserve raw values and retain the verification as a separate audit record.
